title: Testing emails with fake accounts
excerpt: I was working on sending mass emails with domains that won’t bounce back.  I had to research test domains that can be used.  Is there a way that you guys could provide fake/dummy emails?

posts.author: jillsprayinplace (Jill Marie Valente)
posts.cookedHtml: I was working on sending mass emails with domains that won’t bounce back. I had to research test domains that can be used. Is there a way that you guys could provide fake/dummy emails?
